posts.tagline: Weight & feeding tracker for slow-gaining babies

Log feeds and meals in two taps, watch weight trends against age-appropriate bands, and see a daily nutrition breakdown calculated for you. AI recipes are calorie-dense, allergy-aware, and tuned to your baby. Free on iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Android. A tracking and planning tool — not medical advice.

posts.name: ShopperGPT
posts.tagline: Levels the AI playing field for mid-market commerce shops

One-click install starts a pipeline that ingests and enriches your catalog, then builds vector embeddings for text, color, and images. Built-in A/B testing lets you launch on as little as 1% of traffic with side-by-side metrics to prove the lift before scaling up. No theme changes, one-click rollback.

Built for the way modern content actually works Define your domain visually, deliver it however you need, and let context decide what each audience sees — all on a clean hexagonal architecture.

So we built Imagine Anything — an AI coloring page generator that turns any prompt into clean, printable art in under a minute.
